nav.lang_soon: This language will be added soon!

create_bot.title: Create new Bot
create_bot.desc: Enter parameters to create a new automation flow.

chats.title: Chat Messages
chats.no_channel_desc: Please connect a channel first to view chats.
chats.empty_chats_desc: Messages will appear here as soon as they arrive on the channel. You can use the simulator to test bot triggers.
chats.placeholder_customer_simulation: Write a message on behalf of the customer (test bot triggers)...
chats.placeholder_operator: Write a reply as an operator...

contacts.title: Contact List
contacts.no_channel_desc: Please connect a channel first to view contacts.
contacts.no_channel_status_desc: You need to connect a channel first to view the contact list.
contacts.empty_contacts_desc: No connected users found in the system.

broadcast.title: Broadcast Notifications
broadcast.modal_desc: Send a bulk promotional message to all or a specific group of customers.
broadcast.field_recipient: Who should receive it? (Filter by tag)
broadcast.field_message_placeholder: Hello! We have great news for you...
broadcast.no_broadcasts_desc: No bulk campaigns have been sent or scheduled yet.

general.title: General Settings
general.name: Full Name
general.password_desc: Your password will also update when profile details are saved.

billing.upgrade_desc: Upgrade your plan to unlock more automation capabilities.
billing.card_unlink_success: Card removed and switched to Free plan.
billing.card_required_msg: Please link a payment card first to upgrade to a paid plan.
billing.plan_updated_msg: Your plan has been successfully changed to {plan}.
billing.sms_sent_msg: Verification code has been sent to your phone number.
billing.otp_waiting: Waiting for SMS code. Expires in: {timer}
billing.otp_input_error: Verification code is incorrect or incomplete.
billing.card_input_error: Card number is incorrect or incomplete.

limits.title: Limits
limits.info_desc: You can increase limits by upgrading your plan. Free plan allows 2 active automations, Pro allows 50, and Premium allows 500, with up to 10 connected channels.

bonuses.title: Bonuses
bonuses.desc: Enter a promo code to receive a bonus
bonuses.success_msg: Promo code "{code}" successfully activated! $10 bonus added to your balance.

cancel_confirm.title: Cancel Subscription
cancel_confirm.message: Are you sure you want to cancel your Premium subscription? Premium benefits will be lost after cancellation.

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.desc: Choose a plan that fits your business needs

settings_page.user_details_desc: Update your profile details in the system
settings_page.db_manage_desc: You can export the system database, import a backup to migrate data, or fully reset all local configurations.
settings_page.db_export_desc: A backup of all current configurations and chatbot flows (.json)
settings_page.db_import_desc: Upload a backup file (.json) to restore settings
settings_page.extra_actions_desc: Clear system data or return to default state
settings_page.team_desc: A history of users who registered using your referral link
settings_page.ig_direct_desc: This connection is required for automated messages.
settings_page.webhook_desc: Configure a webhook URL for external CRM integrations.
settings_page.api_keys_desc: Manage API keys for external integrations
settings_page.card_limit_msg: You can connect at most {limit} channels on your current plan. Upgrade to Premium in the 'Billing & Plans' section to add more.
settings_page.clear_data_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all database configurations? This action is irreversible.
settings_page.ig_perms_desc: Instagram can unexpectedly lose the connection to your page permissions. If you encounter any trouble, like content not sending, refresh your permissions first.
settings_page.tg_perms_desc: Telegram bot connection can occasionally fail or need a token update. If you encounter any trouble, like messages not replying, refresh connection first.
settings_page.delete_channel_desc: Removing this connection will stop all chatbot activities. Flows, custom user states, and inbox logic on this channel will be permanently disabled.
settings_page.delete_confirm_prompt: To confirm deletion, type the channel username "{username}" below:
settings_page.import_error: Uploaded file is invalid or does not contain database values.
settings_page.invalid_session: User ID not found in session. Please refresh the page and try again.
settings_page.remove_account_desc: It will remove Account and all Contacts, Chats, Automations and Growth tools associated with selected Account.
settings_page.clear_data_confirm_desc: This action will completely clear all contacts, bots, and broadcasts.
settings_page.delete_channel_confirm_desc: This action will completely delete the selected channel connection, along with all associated chats and automations.
settings_page.link_ig_subtitle: Must be a Business or Creator account
settings_page.ig_connect_desc: Connect your Instagram Creator or Business profile to automate Direct messages and set up auto-replies.
settings_page.ig_personal_warning: You can only connect Instagram Business or Creator accounts through your Facebook page. Personal profiles are not supported.
settings_page.tg_step_4: Copy the token and paste it here

automations_page.title: Automations
automations_page.no_channels_warning_desc: Connect an Instagram or Telegram account in settings to create and run automation flows.
automations_page.quick_bot_desc: Create a chatbot in one minute without complex visual flows — just enter keywords and the reply text.
automations_page.no_flows_found_desc: No automations have been created in the selected group or matching your search query.
automations_page.delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this automation flow?
automations_page.quick_bot_modal_desc: This quick flow will consist of a single keyword trigger and a direct reply message.
automations_page.quick_bot_created_inactive: New bot created in inactive status as the active flows limit ({limit}) has been reached.
automations_page.template_inactive: Template loaded in inactive status as the active flows limit ({limit}) has been reached.
automations_page.template_error_no_channels: Please connect a channel in settings first to load templates!
automations_page.activation_limit_reached: You can run at most {limit} active automations on your current plan. Deactivate other flows or upgrade your plan to enable this one.
automations_page.add_group_desc: Enter a name to group and sort your automation flows.
automations_page.delete_group_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this group? The automations inside will not be deleted, they will simply become uncategorized.
automations_page.tmpl_lead_magnet_desc: Send a free guide link when a keyword is sent via DM.
automations_page.tmpl_story_coupon_desc: Automatically send a discount coupon to users who mention you in Stories.
automations_page.tmpl_comment_dm_desc: Send auto-reply to comments and DM link when a user comments on a post.
automations_page.tmpl_welcome_faq_desc: Welcome flow and frequently asked questions for new customers.
automations_page.quick_bot_reply_placeholder: Message text to send when a user types the keyword...

builder.select_node_hint: Select an element on the graph or add a new one.
builder.add_edge_hint: To connect elements, drag a line from the output of one element to another.
builder.unselected_block_desc: Select an element on canvas or add a new block from left panel.
builder.trigger_desc_no_kw: Keywords are not required for this trigger. It runs automatically when the event occurs.
builder.limit_toast: Limit reached: new flow saved as inactive.
builder.tmpl_lead_msg1_label:
DM: Here is your free guide 
https://drive.google.com/...
builder.tmpl_story_msg_label:
DM: Thanks for mentioning us in your Stories! 
Here is your special coupon: STORY20
builder.tmpl_comment_msg1_label: Comment reply: Hello! Sent to your DM
builder.tmpl_comment_msg2_label: DM: Here is details about product and prices
builder.tmpl_welcome_msg1_label: DM: Hello! Which of our services are you interested in?
builder.initial_msg_connected: Instagram DM: Hello! You have successfully connected to the system.
builder.initial_msg_how_help: Instagram DM: Hello! How can I help you?
builder.ai_prompt_placeholder: Analyze user message and draft a friendly, concise reply...
builder.ai_output_var_desc: Use {variable} in the next message to display the response
builder.prohibit_restart_desc: During the specified time the automation can be started only once. All other restarts will be ignored and skipped.
builder.trigger_desc_no_kw_story_live: Keywords are not required for this trigger. The trigger will fire every time the user performs story/live activity.
builder.entry_point_desc: The automation conversation starts from this block
builder.rich_editor_desc: Enter the message text for the selected block
builder.btn_act_desc: Redirect to the next block (Canvas connection)
builder.btn_link_desc: Redirect to an external site via link
builder.btn_pay_desc: Redirect to the payment page via link
builder.btn_multiple_click_desc: Allows clicking the button multiple times
builder.entry_point_required_toast: At least one starting block is required.
builder.tmpl_lead_msg1_label: Hi, want to get a lesson on setting up automation in Direct with a subscription check and lead magnet delivery?🤩
builder.tmpl_lead_msg2_label: Great! Thank you for subscribing. Here is the bonus lesson link: https://t.me/yourusername
builder.tmpl_lead_msg3_label: Unfortunately, you are not subscribed yet. Please subscribe to our page and click 'Check subscription'.
builder.tmpl_lead_msg4_label: You are still not subscribed, you need to subscribe to get the bonus.

ai_agent.select_template_desc: Launch one of the artificial intelligence agent templates suitable for automating your business.
ai_agent.curator_desc: A personal assistant who provides smart, friendly, and precise answers to students based on textbooks, transcripts, and PDF materials via Telegram bot (RAG system).
ai_agent.fb_leads_desc_card: An agent that sorts lead data from Facebook target ad forms using AI, routes them to CRM groups, and sends an automatic welcome message.
ai_agent.fb_feature_3: Routing and tagging to CRM groups
ai_agent.forbidden_desc: AI will not answer questions about these topics and will immediately escalate to a human agent.
ai_agent.escalation_desc: The conversation is transferred to a human operator when the following conditions are met:
ai_agent.add_rule_placeholder: Example: Customer is angry or asks for a phone number
ai_agent.ai_creativity_desc: Lower values result in factual/precise replies, higher values make it more creative and free-flowing.
ai_agent.knowledge_desc: The AI assistant replies strictly using the information provided below. Keep it updated.
ai_agent.lesson_content_desc: This document content serves as the primary source of knowledge for the AI agent.
ai_agent.sandbox_desc: Test the AI agent's responses, knowledge retrieval, and topic moderation rules in real time.
ai_agent.fb_leads_desc: A visual flow to automatically parse and route lead details from Meta ads to CRM and AI analysis.
ai_agent.simulator_desc: Fill in lead details to visually simulate a Facebook webhook request.
ai_agent.mapping_desc: Map Meta form fields to variables in the Sendly CRM database.
ai_agent.routing_desc: Rules to route new leads into CRM groups and assign categorizing tags.
ai_agent.add_tag_placeholder: Type new tag and press Enter...
ai_agent.tg_not_linked_msg: To enable the AI Agent, please link a Telegram bot first in the channels section by entering its token.
ai_agent.fb_leads_status_active_desc: AI Agent is automatically sorting and routing new leads from Facebook target ads to CRM groups.
ai_agent.fb_leads_status_inactive_desc: Facebook Lead Handler is disabled. Leads will not go to CRM.
ai_agent.webhook_url_desc: Copy this URL to Facebook Developer Console
ai_agent.verify_token_desc: Enter this in Meta Webhook 'Verify Token' field
ai_agent.ai_prompt_placeholder: Describe how AI should analyze the lead and which group it should route to...
ai_agent.welcome_message_desc: {{name}} will be replaced by the customer's name.
ai_agent.welcome_message_placeholder: Enter welcome message to send automatically...
ai_agent.customer_message_placeholder: Customer question or lead message text...
ai_agent.raw_webhook_warning: ️ The field_data keys in JSON must match the keys in the Field Mapping table on the left.
ai_agent.curator_active_desc: AI Curator is currently actively replying to students via Telegram bot.
ai_agent.curator_inactive_desc: AI Curator is disabled. Standard keyword auto-replies will handle Telegram questions.
ai_agent.tg_bot_not_linked_desc: Telegram bot not linked. Please configure a Telegram bot first for AI Curator to work.
ai_agent.system_instruction_placeholder: Define the AI agent's role and response guidelines...
ai_agent.forbidden_topics_desc: When asked about these topics, the bot will automatically ask to stay within the course scope.
ai_agent.escalation_rules_desc: When these conditions occur, the bot enables liveTakeover and alerts the curator.
ai_agent.escalation_rule_placeholder: e.g., When asking about course payment...
ai_agent.auto_outreach_desc: If a student gets stuck on a lesson, the bot will be the first to reach out and offer help.
ai_agent.chat_history_cleared: Chat history cleared. Type new questions to test!
ai_agent.lesson_transcript_placeholder: Paste the transcript of this lesson's audio/video recording or textbook text here. AI will reply based on this via RAG...
ai_agent.no_lesson_selected_desc: Select a lesson from the list on the left or create a new module/lesson to fill the knowledge base.
ai_agent.lesson_name_placeholder: Lesson name (e.g., Lesson 3. Setting up funnels)
ai_agent.lesson_create_error_desc: You must create at least one module before creating a lesson.
ai_agent.no_analytics_yet: Not enough messages for analysis. Send messages via simulator first.

partner.title: Partner Dashboard
partner.monthly_payout_info: Payments are processed on the 5th of each month.
partner.commission_desc: You receive a 30% affiliate commission from every subscription payment made by users who registered using your referral link.
partner.ref_link_desc: Users signing up through this link will receive a 7-day Pro plan trial for free, plus an extra 7 days when they link a payment card.
partner.no_referrals_sub: Share your referral link to start earning commissions
partner.modal_message: Your Pro partner status is active. A special 30% commission rate applies for 3 years (36 months). Payouts are approved at the beginning of each month.
partner.history_desc: List of referred clients and their status

login_page.smtp_warning_desc: No SMTP credentials found. Verification code is displayed below:
login_page.google_warning: Google Sign-In is not configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in environment settings to enable.
login_page.otp_sent_to: Verification code has been sent to:
login_page.error_google_token: Failed to decode Google ID Token.

lessons_page.lesson_1_desc: In this lesson you will fully learn how to register on the platform and connect an Instagram Professional account.
lessons_page.lesson_2_title: Building Automatic Sales Funnel via Direct
lessons_page.lesson_2_desc: Using keywords to automatically tell customers product prices and direct them to order.
lessons_page.lesson_3_title: Setting up Story and Comment Triggers
lessons_page.lesson_3_desc: Configuring chatbot replies when customers mention you in stories or comment under posts.
lessons_page.lesson_4_desc: Bulk sending promotions and discount messages to all active subscribers in the database.
